title: Built With You, For You
message:
Dear Viumo User,

Viumo is growing through real user experience, and your voice plays a big role in how the app evolves.

We are continuously improving performance, adding meaningful features, and refining the streaming experience. Your suggestions, observations, and feedback help us focus on what truly matters to you.

If there’s something you’d love to see, something you feel can be better, or an experience you’d like improved, we’d love to hear from you.

Reach us anytime at:
viumoservices@gmail.com

Every message is read and considered as part of Viumo’s journey forward.

Viumo is proudly community-driven, and we’re grateful to be building it together with you.
